summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact covers 20 of 25 listed candidates; no shared canonical is invented. Open hydrated PRs are kept independent for maintainer review because merge/fix/close actions are blocked or unsafe without merge preflight, review-bot comment hydration, and current mergeability. #89900 is already closed. Five listed refs were absent from the compacted live-state artifact and are scoped needs_human for rehydration only.
